title: PDF Viewer fixed viewport — zoom and pan inside full pane (dbg89)
description:
The PDF Viewer scroll box was still resizing with page content on Ctrl+wheel because the container lived in normal document flow and styles-desktop.css was cached at an old version (20260605a), so layout fixes never loaded.

dbg89 pins the dark scroll viewport to the full board with absolute inset layout — only PDF pages inside zoom. Two-axis overflow enables Ctrl+drag pan when zoomed in. Styles cache bust updated so the fix actually applies.

Who is affected: private OVH PipeSync users on PDF Viewer workspace. Map workspace unchanged.
changeLog: Scroll viewport fills board edge-to-edge; does not shrink on zoom out.
PDF pages zoom inside fixed container (max-content inner layer).
Ctrl+drag pan works vertically and horizontally when zoomed in.
Fixed Ctrl+wheel zoom anchor for continuous viewer.
Cache bust dbg89 on app.js and plan-view modules.
